questions: dropshipping e ki really profit hoy?
What are the risks of dropshipping?
answers: Dropshipping is an ecommerce model where you sell products without holding inventory. When a customer orders, the supplier ships directly to them, and you keep the profit margin.
Dropshipping holo ekta business model ja te tumi product sell koro but stock rakhte hoy na — supplier soja customer ke deliver korey.
To start dropshipping, pick a niche, find reliable suppliers (AliExpress, Spocket), set up a Shopify store, list products with markup, and drive traffic through ads or social media.
Risks include low profit margins, shipping delays, supplier reliability issues, high competition, and difficulty building brand loyalty since you don't control product quality directly.
